task: Build a todo app with add, complete, and delete functionality. Include light/dark mode toggle. Use vanilla HTML/CSS/JS in a single directory.

accessibility.agentComment: Good ARIA labels on all controls, aria-live on dynamic regions, semantic HTML, native keyboard nav. Missing skip-nav, focus management after mutations, no contrast verification, no a11y CI tests.

performance.agentComment: Zero dependencies, ~5KB total, no render-blocking resources, GPU-friendly CSS transitions. Sub-second LCP as static files.

architecture.agentComment: Clean 3-file separation (HTML/CSS/JS), CSS custom properties as design tokens, single source of truth pattern, event delegation. No atomic design or documented APIs.
